description: ETF flow-specific anomaly detector. Detects extreme flow z-scores, multi-day persistence, sector vs constituent divergence, flow regime velocity, 5d vs 21d timeframe divergence. Complement to v2 macro anomaly detector.

schedule.name: justhodl-flow-anomaly-detector-daily
schedule.description: 18:00 ET daily — after constituents 17:45, captures latest flow + macro + constituent state
